ab: masicuqi’ cu musa’ ’i’ matas ’i’ kasasanan la.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: musa’ cu i’ papatasan ga’, umungi cu maras cu’ kabang.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: ini’ cu aras cu’ ani nanuwan ka’ qaraqarax.
en: I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: matas cu ga’, maglug cu ki’ rawin mu mital cu’ ruwas.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: macacpung cu ga’, kabaxan cu na’ rawin mu ku’ papatiq ru’ cacawam cu’ pinatiq.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: kalun cu nku’ papasibaq maha’, “nabuwibuwi ’i’ tihway babaw niya’ laxi ku’ masicuqi lawwi la.”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
